input.tenant_message: The microwave started sparking and making loud popping sounds when I turned it on this evening. I immediately shut it off and unplugged it. There's a burnt smell coming from it and I can see a black scorch mark on the inside wall of the microwave. I'm not going to use it again — this seems really dangerous.

ai_output.recommended_action: Do not attempt to use the microwave. Confirm it remains unplugged. Arrange for immediate inspection or replacement — a sparking microwave with internal burn damage poses a fire risk and should not be returned to service. Replace the unit if the waveguide cover or magnetron is damaged.
